nasb.text: But Nebuzaradan the captain of the guard left some of the poorest of the land to be vinedressers and plowmen.

esv.text: But Nebuzaradan the captain of the guard left some of the poorest of the land to be vinedressers and plowmen.

cnv.text: 至於那地最貧窮的人，護衛長尼布撒拉旦把他們留下，去修理葡萄園和耕種田地。

ccb.text: 只留下一些最贫穷的人，让他们照料葡萄园、耕种田地。
